ring":null,"mark_content":"本書は、日々の「小さな行動」の積み重ねこそが、自己を形成し大きな影響を与えるという核心を提示している。","content":null,"title":null,"expanded_content":null,"picture_link":"permanent/6a96f9e9f528462da5eceab0567a9512/mark/20260507_113741_30274a7b.jpg","mark_id":"7b18847eea859999f298e8724e0bbb78","ocr_data_link":"highlight/ocr_data/ocr_20260507113743-mark@b0c96767b3627bf0da6dba.txt","link_expire_timestamp":null,"picture_local_path":"plaud_images/note_recording_session_1778147921_5926320.jpg","picture_full_url":null,"is_user_edited":false,"mark_status":3,"error_message":null,"retry_count":null,"last_failed_time":null,"is_user_deleted":null},{"timestamp":5938365,"mark_type":1,"mark_type_string":null,"mark_content":"お金について議論します。","content":null,"title":null,"expanded_content":null,"picture_link":null,"mark_id":"9cd59ca666f50a86425772f6be489794","ocr_data_link":null,"link_expire_timestamp":null,"picture_local_path":"/var/mobile/Containers/Data/Application/CAD020FB-B022-4BE4-9299-ED274F0181C5/Documents/audio_marks/PLAUD_mark_Audio_01:38:58_1778153861685.opus","picture_full_url":null,"is_user_edited":null,"mark_status":3,"error_message":null,"retry_count":null,"last_failed_time":null,"is_user_deleted":null},{"timestamp":5939798,"mark_type":2,"mark_type_string":null,"mark_content":"本書は、ささいな行動の積み重ねがアイデンティティー 9 割が前日と同じであるため、「問い」の質を変えることが行動変容には不可欠である。","content":null,"title":null,"expanded_content":null,"picture_link":"permanent/6a96f9e9f528462da5eceab0567a9512/mark/20260507_113827_cc023ee0.jpg","mark_id":"3abb2f777e2c3281fb76cd006f9976f8","ocr_data_link":"highlight/ocr_data/ocr_20260507113830-mark@07dd61fc38ed3e64c64cea.txt","link_expire_timestamp":null,"picture_local_path":"plaud_images/note_recording_session_1778147921_5972049.jpg","picture_full_url":null,"is_user_edited":false,"mark_status":3,"error_message":null,"retry_count":null,"last_failed_time":null,"is_user_deleted":null},{"timestamp":5984504,"mark_type":2,"mark_type_string":null,"mark_content":"本書は、ワクワクすることや感謝、失敗からの学び、そして「今の自分のベスト」を問うことで、ポジティブな思考力と自己成長を促すことを目的としています。","content":null,"title":null,"expanded_content":null,"picture_link":"permanent/6a96f9e9f528462da5eceab0567a9512/mark/20260507_113838_9115f938.jpg","mark_id":"635206ff13e45fbe396c295c12a87a25","ocr_data_link":"highlight/ocr_data/ocr_20260507113839-mark@dc894dc0063db025ef9774.txt","link_expire_timestamp":null,"picture_local_path":"plaud_images/note_recording_session_1778147921_5984504.jpg","picture_full_url":null,"is_user_edited":false,"mark_status":3,"error_message":null,"retry_count":null,"last_failed_time":null,"is_user_deleted":null},{"timestamp":5999665,"mark_type":2,"mark_type_string":null,"mark_content":"本書は、人生の停滞を打破する鍵として、自分ではなく「周りの人の役に立つこと」に意識を向ける視点転換の重要性を説いています。","content":null,"title":null,"expanded_content":null,"picture_link":"permanent/6a96f9e9f528462da5eceab0567a9512/mark/20260507_113851_d2b78528.jpg","mark_id":"3b3f4bd717b6ea48135bd45277a8cf2e","ocr_data_link":"highlight/ocr_data/ocr_20260507113853-mark@d427bd75a1d5f2b8caf1c5.txt","link_expire_timestamp":null,"picture_local_path":"plaud_images/note_recording_session_1778147921_5999665.jpg","picture_full_url":null,"is_user_edited":false,"mark_status":3,"error_message":null,"retry_count":null,"last_failed_time":null,"is_user_deleted":null},{"timestamp":6008585,"mark_type":2,"mark_type_st
